title: Leverage the remote cache only with hermetic actions
description: Turn on remote caching after actions are hermetic, so cache entries are valid across machines instead of returning stale or wrong outputs.
body: Use when introducing or relying on a shared remote cache or remote execution. Do not enable caching while actions still read undeclared inputs. Actions: confirm hermeticity first; configure the remote cache endpoint; verify cache hits on a clean checkout reproduce correct outputs. Validation signals include a high hit rate across fresh checkouts and CI agents, with no behavioral difference from a local build. Risk boundary: caching non-hermetic actions serves machine-specific or stale artifacts to everyone, so prove hermeticity before trusting the shared cache.
